LONG NAME: SR_SPLMTL_PHYS_ACTVTY_1_2_QTY 
TYPE: 
NUM

4 
SOURCE:

COMMENT: 
This field represents total minutes (in the week) of moderate exercise. 
Variables that start with “SR” include information for each
